name: kiny
description: Kiny — 受 Ink 启发的互动叙事 DSL 生态（engine / player / web-reader / editor）。子项目各自自包含构建，本文件只做跨子项目的顺序编排，不使用 npm workspaces。

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix engine install && npm --prefix player install && npm --prefix web-reader install && npm --prefix editor install && npm --prefix reader install
scripts.build:core: npm run build:engine && npm run build:player
scripts.build:web-reader: npm run build:core && npm --prefix web-reader run build
scripts.build:editor: npm run build:core && npm --prefix editor run build
scripts.build:reader: npm run build:core && npm --prefix reader run build
scripts.test: npm run test:engine && npm run test:player && npm run test:web-reader && npm run test:editor && npm run test:reader
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix engine run typecheck && npm --prefix player run typecheck && npm --prefix web-reader run typecheck && npm --prefix editor run typecheck && npm --prefix reader run typecheck
scripts.dev:web-reader: npm run build:core && npm --prefix web-reader run dev
scripts.dev:editor: npm run build:core && npm --prefix editor run tauri dev
scripts.dev:reader: npm run build:core && npm --prefix reader run tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build:core && npm --prefix editor run tauri build
scripts.tauri:build:reader: npm run build:core && npm --prefix reader run tauri build
